## RageFX: ragefx_icon.png added to git (commit 00fb449)

- Icon was previously gitignored as a generated binary asset
- Regenerated via together.ai `black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-schnell` (512Ă—512, 4 steps, retro neon RAGEFX aesthetic)
- Removed `overlay/assets/ragefx_icon.png` from `.gitignore`
- Committed both changes, pushed to origin/master as `00fb449`
- Icon is now tracked; will survive `git pull` on Windows dev machine
- Note: `ragefx.ico` is still gitignored (line 23 of `.gitignore`)

Latest commit chain: 00fb449 â†’ 65bbc57 â†’ e5bbfa6 â†’ 803920b
keywords: icon, asset, gitignore, commit, together-ai, flux, png

memories.content:
## RageFX: MCP build server network-exposure proposal

Current state: MCP build server (`.mcp-servers/ragefx-build/`) runs locally via stdio, VSCode-only.
Proposed: Add HTTP/SSE transport with auth so the AI assistant can call `start_build`/`watch_build` directly via `exec curl` â€” enabling fully autonomous codeâ†’pushâ†’buildâ†’report loop.
Status: User asked if it's worth doing. Suggested yes for tighter workflow. Awaiting user decision.

keywords: reshade, vr-compositor, post-processing, rcas, lut, fov-crop, display-shim, mcp-build

memories.content:
## RageFX: updated install layout and log/config locations

Decision: RageFX should no longer install into `%LOCALAPPDATA%` as the primary application location. Instead the main app installs to `C:\Program Files\RageFX`, the OpenVR driver to `C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\SteamVR\drivers\00rageFX`, while INI/config/temp files live under `%LOCALAPPDATA%\RageFX` and logs under `%LOCALAPPDATA%\RageFX\logs`. Future installer scripts must mirror the RGCS layout (Program Files for binaries, AppData for mutable state) and avoid writing binaries into AppData.
